image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why we resist change, even when it’s better?
Context visual: This is status quo bias, a tendency to favor the familiar over the unknown.
Escalation visual: Studies show it’s not just laziness; it’s wired in our brains. We feel safer sticking with what we know.
Evidence visual: People often pay more for old habits than exploring new options. We fear loss more than we crave gain.
Payoff visual: Recognizing this bias empowers us to make better choices and embrace change.
Cta visual: Ready to challenge your status quo? Hit like and follow for more insights!
